line: Come on, bubble boy. Press start.
One hero. Hundreds of monsters. Seems fair.
The checkpoint will not save you.
You are already inside the Hex.
One more hit will end the run.
Find cover. Find courage. Find something!
Do not let the last bubble burst.
Large monster. Small arena. Bad combination.
That is how you pop a nightmare.
There is something beneath this level.
Not every enemy wants to fight.
The bubbles remember the old kingdom.
The Hex is watching the player.
Do not trust the final door.
You thought you were playing the Hex?
The Hex has been playing you.
